plugins.name: agent-teacher
plugins.description: Teach a technical concept through a six-part structure: intuition, runnable example or structured pseudocode, code walkthrough, trap, pointers, and 2-3 test questions. Picks the code language per concept (Python by default; PyTorch pseudocode for architectures and training algorithms like GRPO and MoE; Rust for ownership; Go for channels). Triggers on 'explain X / what is X / teach me X / 解释 X / 教我 X / 什么是 X'.
